# akp_custom_role (Resource)

Manages an Akuity Platform custom role. Custom roles attach a Casbin policy that can be referenced from API keys, teams, or OIDC group mappings. A role can be scoped to the whole organization (omit `workspace`) or to a single workspace (set `workspace`). Changing `workspace` triggers replacement; `name`, `description`, and `policy` can be updated in place.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Role name (must be unique within the scope)
- `policy` (String) Casbin policy granting the role's permissions. Each non-empty, non-comment line is either a `p, sub, obj, act, resource` rule or a `g, sub, role` grouping. Server enforces additional scope checks (org policies cannot reference workspace-only objects and vice versa).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Human-readable description for the role
- `workspace` (String) Workspace name. When set, the role is scoped to this workspace; when omitted, the role is org-scoped.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Custom role ID
